message.content:
@startuml
actor User
participant Frontend
participant Backend
database Database

box "Login"
end box

group Login
  User -> Frontend : Presses the "Login"-button
  Frontend -> Backend : Request to open new window
  Frontend <-- Backend : Opens new window
  User -> Frontend : Enters login information
  User -> Frontend : Presses "Confirm"-button
  Frontend -> Backend : Request to validate input
  Backend -> Database : Validates login input

  alt [Successful case]
    Backend <-- Database : Validation successful
    Frontend <-- Backend : Allows user to proceed
    User <-- Frontend : Proceeds to next window
  else [Validation failed]
    Backend <--x Database : Validation failed
    Frontend <-- Backend : Displays alert of type ERROR
    User <-- Frontend : Lists up fields with errors
  end
end

group Cancel
  User -> Frontend : Presses the "Cancel"-button
  Frontend -> Backend : Request to close process
  Frontend <-- Backend : Closes window
end

@enduml
